case_title: PATRICIA MARDEN ET AL VS. VIRGINIA YING

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-31-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA MARDEN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MERCY NIEBRES IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT VIRGINIA YING IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA MARDEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARDEN, PATRICIA NIEBRES, MERCY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YING, VIRGINIA THE COURT DIRECTED THE PARTIES TO PROVIDE RELIABLE TESTIMONY ABOUT THE SOURCE OF WATER INTRUSION FOR THE JANUARY 10 HEARING. NEITHER PARTY DID SO; THE COURT FINDS THAT MS. YING DOES NOT HAVE SUFFICIENT BUILDING EXPERTISE TO OPINE RELIABLY ON THE SUBJECT. BOTH THE CLAIM AND CROSS-CLAIM FAIL FOR LACK OF EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2019 - JUDGMENT.
